## Description

<!-- Describe the changes introduced by this PR. What does it do and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `perf` — performance improvement
- [ ] `refactor` — refactoring (no behavior change)
- [ ] `test` — adding or updating tests
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance, dependencies, CI

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally: `mvn clean verify`
- [ ] Coverage stays ≥ 80% (JaCoCo gate)
- [ ] Mutation score stays ≥ 70% (PIT gate, `mvn verify org.pitest:pitest-maven:mutationCoverage -Pci`)
- [ ] Javadoc updated for new or modified public methods
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://github.com/totolemarto/Support_biblio_scientifique_java/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md#conventional-commits)

Closes #<!-- issue number -->
